detectors.description:
HighBank.setOwner(address)._newOwner (HighBank.sol#629) lacks a zero-check on :

Reentrancy in HighBank.refundTokens(address,address,uint256) (HighBank.sol#709-721):

	- token.transfer(_refund,_value) (HighBank.sol#717)

	- RefundTokens(_token,_refund,_value) (HighBank.sol#719)
